headline: A Look At CrowdStrike (CRWD) Valuation After Strong FY 2026 Results And AI Security Momentum
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) has drawn fresh attention after reporting fiscal 2026 results that included positive GAAP net income, record net new annual recurring revenue above $1b, and guidance that points to continued subscription growth. See our latest analysis for CrowdStrike Holdings. The latest results and product announcements come after a sharp rebound in sentiment, with a 12.8% 7 day share price return and a 9.77% 30 day share price return partly offsetting a 16.19% 90 day share price...
